data.title: The two giants of the blind box world are joining forces

data.author: Shubhangi Goel
data.title: Vibe coding is being called the greatest unlock for non-techies. These 6 startups are raising billions.
data.description: These entrants are competing with far bigger players, including OpenAI, Anthropic, and Microsoft, that make their own AI-powered coding tools.

data.author: Angelica Ang
data.title: Asia rolls out four-day weeks and work-from-home as emergency measures to solve a fuel crisis caused by Iran war
data.description: The energy crunch is forcing governments to adopt extreme measures to save fuel; in Thailand, government employees are being asked to take the stairs.
